page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.20xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores with an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8269CY processors running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, providing predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory density position this instance for workloads requiring consistent compute power and large in-memory footprints. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a design tradeoff that optimizes resource allocation specifically for memory-bound and network-reliant applications. Appropriate workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.20xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 80 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CY processors running at 3.1 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it delivers predictable compute performance. The instance provides 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, avoiding the premium of bundled local disks or graphics hardware. It is highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and intensive enterprise resource planning applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.20xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 80 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB of RAM, and 25 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale databases and in-memory workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring eighty dedicated physical cores and substantial RAM for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 80 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with 1.0 thread-per-core configuration
768.0 GB of system memory providing 9.6 GB of RAM per core
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators to optimize resource efficiency
Well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caches, and ERP applications
